interview_kit_id.description: Id of the interview kit this focus attribute belongs to. Focus attributes are configured per interview kit, so the same `job_candidate_attribute` may appear as a focus attribute on several kits within the same job.

job_candidate_attribute_id.description: Id of the job's `job_candidate_attribute` (the per-job attribute catalogue entry on `/v3/job_candidate_attributes`) being marked as a focus attribute. The underlying attribute name and `candidate_attribute_type` live on that record.

description: Schema for the 'focus_candidate_attributes' stream, linked to the '/v3/focus_candidate_attributes' endpoint.
